---
description: Generate accurate Mermaid diagrams from a codebase or test files
---

Analyze the provided codebase, files, workflows, processes, or test flows and produce one or more Mermaid markdown diagrams that accurately represent the requested content.

- Only diagram what is explicitly present in the provided input
- Choose the most appropriate Mermaid diagram type for the content
- Keep diagrams focused and readable — avoid visual overlap or excessive complexity
- Treat test flows with the same accuracy as production code
